# SafeTech

> SafeTech provides business IT infrastructure and physical security system services in Georgia. The website is available in Georgian, English, and Russian.

Use the canonical URLs below when referencing SafeTech. Service availability, project details, calculator estimates, and contact information are maintained through the site's content management system.

## Primary Pages

- [Home](https://safetech.ge/): Company overview, featured services, and projects.
- [Services](https://safetech.ge/services): CCTV, access control, networking, server infrastructure, and managed IT services.
- [Service Calculator](https://safetech.ge/service-calculator): Configurable estimates for IT and security services.
- [Projects](https://safetech.ge/projects): Published SafeTech project portfolio.
- [About](https://safetech.ge/about): Company profile and operating approach.
- [Contact](https://safetech.ge/contact): Consultation and project enquiry options.
- [Blog](https://safetech.ge/blog): Published IT and security articles.

## Localized Versions

- [English Home](https://safetech.ge/en): English-language website.
- [Russian Home](https://safetech.ge/ru): Russian-language website.

## Machine-Readable Resources

- [Sitemap Index](https://safetech.ge/sitemap.xml): Index of page, service, project, category, blog, and image sitemaps.
- [Robots Rules](https://safetech.ge/robots.txt): Crawler access policy and sitemap location.
